# Executive Summary

## Summary of Changes in Assessment Inputs

<!---
List of changes (if any) in the input data, including estimated catches assumed for the current year and projected catches for current year + 1 and current year + 2.

List of changes (if any) in the assessment methodology. 
**This is one of the most important sections of the SAFE report**. 
Common mistakes in this section include: 1) listing something that *has not* changed, and 2) not listing something that *has* changed.
--->

List of changes in input data for **`r params$species`**:

* Estimated catch for `r year`: `r c1` t.
* Projected catch for `r year + 1`: `r c2` t.
* Projected catch for `r year + 2`: `r c3` t.

## Summary of Results

{{< include 01a-main_table.qmd >}}

### Area Apportionment
<!---
Text table of area apportionments (if any) for the recommended one- and two-year ahead BRDs, ABCs and OFLs, with a brief description of the apportionment methodology.
--->

{{< include 01b-apportionment.qmd >}}
